projects.detailedDescription:
Campus Sync is a web-based campus management platform built to streamline administrative and academic operations through role-specific portals.

Admins can manage users, enrolled students, and academic subjects. Faculty members can log daily attendance and query attendance history filtered by Faculty, Subject, and Date.

Authentication uses stateless JWT — the React frontend stores the token in local storage and an Axios interceptor automatically appends it as a Bearer token to every API call. The Spring Boot backend validates each request through a JwtRequestFilter chain, authorizing access based on user roles.

Database entities are managed through Spring Data JPA (Hibernate) on MySQL, with no raw SQL needed for standard operations. The UI is built with React 19, Vite 7, and Tailwind CSS v4 for a fast, responsive dashboard experience.

Built as the live training project at Kiran Academy, Pune — part of a 6-month integrated placement-linked full stack Java program.
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack campus management platform with role-based portals for Admins and Faculty — featuring secure JWT auth, student/subject management, and a daily attendance ledger with history queries.
projects.techStack: Spring Boot, Java 17, React.js 19, Vite 7, MySQL, Spring Security, JWT, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, Tailwind CSS 4, Axios, React Router DOM 7, REST APIs
projects.title: Campus Sync – Campus Attendance Management System

projects.detailedDescription: Developed an AI-powered web application to help users practice group discussions with real-time feedback. Integrated Google Gemini API for intelligent coaching. Built with React and TypeScript for a smooth UI, Firebase for authentication and data storage, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Helps users improve communication and presentation skills before actual GD rounds.
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered platform for real-time group discussion practice with automated feedback and communication analytics.
projects.techStack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Firebase, Google Gemini API
projects.title: AI GD Helper Buddy – Your Personal GD Coach

projects.detailedDescription: Built for Smart India Hackathon 2025. A decentralized platform to automate and secure blue carbon offset projects. Coordinated workflows between NGOs, verifiers, and admins for transparent carbon credit tracking using Solidity smart contracts on Ganache. React frontend with Tailwind CSS, Django REST backend, Dockerized deployment, and PostgreSQL database.
projects.shortDescription: SIH 2025 — AI/ML powered carbon credit issuance with blockchain verification, interactive Leaflet maps, and TensorFlow.
projects.techStack: React, TensorFlow, Solidity, AWS, Tailwind CSS, Django, REST APIs, Docker, Ganache, PostgreSQL
projects.title: Blockchain-Based Blue Carbon Registry & MRV System

projects.detailedDescription: Built a complete full-stack portfolio website with a Spring Boot backend and React.js frontend. Features a JWT-secured admin dashboard to manage profile photo, resume, projects, and certifications dynamically. Images are stored via Cloudinary. Data is persisted in PostgreSQL with Hibernate ORM. No redeployment needed to update content.
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack dynamic portfolio site with a secure admin dashboard for real-time content management without redeployment.
projects.techStack: Spring Boot, React.js, PostgreSQL, Spring Security, JWT, Hibernate, Cloudinary, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs
projects.title: Dynamic Full-Stack Portfolio Application

projects.detailedDescription:
Managing remote interns without a structured system leads to untracked attendance, unclear task delegation, slow feedback cycles, and scattered team communication. This project solves all of that in one place.
Role-Based Access

Three roles — Admin, Manager, and Intern — each with their own dashboard and access restrictions. Admins manage the entire system, Managers handle tasks and reviews, Interns track their own work.
Attendance Tracking

Interns check in and check out daily. Working hours are auto-calculated server-side at checkout to prevent any client-side manipulation.
Task Management

Admins and Managers assign tasks to individuals or entire teams with deadlines, priorities, and optional file attachments. Interns move tasks through a controlled lifecycle — Pending → In Progress → Completed. Managers can reject completed tasks with feedback for revision.
Work Submission and Review

Interns submit deliverables with a written work log and supporting file. Managers review submissions, preview the uploaded file, and approve or reject with a comment — creating a real feedback loop.
Project and Team Management

Admins create projects, define teams, assign managers, and group interns under teams. Tasks can be assigned to a whole team or to a specific intern within one.
Meeting Scheduler

Managers schedule virtual meetings and invite participants. A unique meeting room link is auto-generated, and interns can join directly from their dashboard with one click.
Analytics Dashboard

Live charts showing task completion rates, priority breakdown, 7-day attendance trends, and a top performer leaderboard.
projects.shortDescription: A role-based Work-From-Home productivity platform that helps organizations manage remote interns — covering daily attendance, task assignment, work submission reviews, team coordination, and virtual meeting scheduling from a single unified dashboard.
projects.techStack: Java 17, Spring Boot 3.2, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security 6, JWT (jjwt 0.12), Hibernate, MySQL, React.js 18, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Axios, React Router v6, Chart.js, React Hot Toast, Jitsi Meet
projects.title: WFH Productivity & Task Management System
